text:
2. The `ScrollView` now has `.ignoresSafeArea()`, so its container is the full device height. Each page uses `.containerRelativeFrame([.horizontal, .vertical])` (full width AND height), `LazyVStack(spacing: 0)`, `.scrollTargetLayout()`, `.scrollTargetBehavior(.paging)` → the paging stride equals the screen height, so pages snap 1:1 with no seam.
3. The top context strip and bottom control cluster moved from `.safeAreaInset` to `.overlay(alignment: .top/.bottom)` on the ScrollView, positioned into the safe area with `.padding(.top, safeTop + 6)` / `.padding(.bottom, safeBottom + 8)`. They no longer resize the scroll content — they float over the current page only.
